Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF (USD) Accumulating

FUND FACTS AS AT 28 FEBRUARY 2026

Share class details
ISIN: IE00BK5BQT80
SEDOL: BK5BQT8
Ticker: VWRA
Exchange: London Stock Exchange
Listing date: 22 May 2019

Fund details
Fund name: Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF
Domicile: Ireland
Legal structure: UCITS V ICAV
Inception date: 22 May 2019
Base currency: USD
Dividend treatment: Accumulating

Costs and charges
Ongoing Charges Figure (OCF): 0.22%
Total Expense Ratio: 0.22% per annum
Transaction costs: 0.01%

Fund size
Net assets: $20.5 billion USD

Investment objective
The Fund employs a passive management strategy and seeks to track the performance
of the FTSE All-World Index. The Index is a market-capitalisation weighted index
representing the performance of large- and mid-cap stocks in both developed and
emerging markets.

Index information
Index provider: FTSE Russell
Number of stocks: 3,756
Replication: Physical - full replication

Benchmark Performance
1 year tracking difference: -0.08%
3 year tracking difference: -0.09%
Since inception tracking difference: -0.10%

Risk information
Risk rating (SRRI): 6 out of 7

Fund manager
Investment manager: Vanguard Group (Ireland) Limited
Investment adviser: Vanguard Investments UK, Limited

This is a marketing communication.
